textos.texto: Hello! My name is Laura. I'm from Canada, but I live in Peru now. I'm 28 years old. I'm a teacher and I work at a school in Arequipa. I have one brother and one sister. My brother is a doctor and my sister is a student. My family is very kind. Nice to meet you! See you soon, Laura.

preguntas.enunciado: Laura tiene un hermano y una hermana.

textos.texto: This is my friend Marc. He is Canadian and he speaks English and French. He is twenty-five years old. He is tall and he has brown hair. Marc is very funny and kind. He is an engineer and he works in a big company. He has a wife and two children. His wife is a nurse. They are a happy family.

preguntas.enunciado: ¿Cuál es la profesión de la esposa de Marc?
